PreToolUse.hook: Check if on main or master branch. If yes, block with: 'Do not commit directly to main. Use EnterWorktree first, or run /dev to start the pipeline.' Exit code 2 to block.

Check if HEAD has been pushed to origin (compare HEAD against origin/current-branch). If HEAD is already on origin, block with: 'This commit has already been pushed. Create a new commit instead of amending.' Exit code 2 to block.

PostToolUse.hook: If the edited file is a .go file, run 'gofmt -w <file>' on it.
Run 'make test' from the project root. Report results but don't block the commit.
